monitors.name: high error rate
monitors.message:
Error rate above 2% for 5 minutes.
Check the dispatch matching queue first — this is usually a downstream timeout, not us.
Runbook: go/dispatch-svc-runbook

monitors.name: p99 latency breach
monitors.message: p99 latency over 1.5s for 10 minutes. Likely the matching engine — check queue depth before paging upstream teams.

monitors.name: matching queue depth
monitors.message: Matching queue depth over 5000 for 5 minutes — drivers are waiting longer than usual to get matched.
